senses.gloss: cold and sweet water, well abundating in sapid water, source of aqua apt to soak
macerated and dried piece of sustenance, preserve etc., ≈ نَقُوع (naqūʕ)
infusion, liquid where substances bide, = نَقُوع (naqūʕ)
a desert-thistle (Blepharis) gen. et spp.), = شَوْك الضَبّ (šawk aḍ-ḍabb) ^(→ Arabic Wikipedia)
